contribution_description:
[CONTRIBUTION EVENT]
- Type: Time (Minutes)
- Amount: 90
- Description: Santos field clips end-to-end on agroverse_shop_beta + admin@truesight.me YouTube. (1) Stitched 4 PT interview MOVs into single 111s mp4, ran faster-whisper translate to English with per-segment timestamps, hand-cleaned the SRT (Cargill mistranslated as prison; mic-checks dropped), burned subtitles in via ffmpeg. (2) Uploaded the interview compilation + 3 process clips (roasting, winnowing, melanger) to admin@truesight.me YouTube, transcribed each in PT and translated to EN, hand-cleaned each transcript (kakao to cacao, Renegues to Matheus, tea to husks). (3) Re-authenticated the YouTube OAuth token with full youtube scope (was upload-only) so we can update privacy on existing uploads; flipped 6 non-public videos to Public (the 4 new Santos uploads plus 2 pre-existing privates). (4) Embedded interview as featured-video block below Santos hero (Meet Santos), embedded 3 process clips in a video-grid below the gallery (bean to bar). (5) Generated 3 blog posts under /post/santos-* with standard transcript-post template, cross-linking to partner page and Paulo's farm. (6) Inserted 3 cards in blog/index.html VIDEO_TRANSCRIPT_POSTS section. (7) Generated first-frame thumbnails via ffmpeg (720x1280 transcript-thumbs + 640x1138 listing-640w). (8) Registered 4 new YouTube IDs in scripts/youtube_videos.json. Also: prior PRs in flight (96 brazilian-path Santos addition, 97 Santos image optimization 6.4MB to 700KB, 98 hero crop fix, 99 video embeds + blog posts).
- Contributor(s): Gary Teh
--------
